other_observers: Brandon Percival; Brandon spotted it first.
description: small gull slightly smaller and darker-mantled than the common Ring-billed Gulls with which is was sitting on the ice. Noticeable thin all-yellow bill. Mantle with both a white scapular and tertial crescent. Head and hind-neck very heavily streaked with brown. Legs and feet, yellow. Head rounded and bill petite.Behaviors: Sat on ice only. With about 40 RBGUs.Call: none heardPlumage: adult basic
